school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: 73% goes with at least two of Boyd, Art, Workshop, and Period 5.
Nash does not go with Chemistry if and only if all of Workshop goes with Chemistry, Art goes with Period 3, and Workshop does not go with 93%.
Cloister, Library, and Studio go with Art, French, and 88%, in some order.
Period 1, Period 3, and Period 4 go with Boyd, Art, and Geography, in some order.
Dunn goes with at least three of Chemistry, Workshop, 73%, and Period 1.
Boyd's grade is higher than both the class in the Bungalow's grade and the class in Period 3's grade.
83% goes with exactly three of Nash, Art, Library, and Period 1.
The Art class' grade is lower than both Frost's grade and the class in Period 1's grade.
Either Cloister goes with French or Studio goes with Period 5.
Either Frost goes with 93% or Geography goes with Period 5.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: 1793 goes with at least two of Boris, Benoni, Zugzwang, and 1st.
